steps.t: Winegar is at the inn in Stoke. Thane Ordlac informed you that Winegar, Reeve Fríthild's physician, asked to speak with you privately.
Alfbert is at the inn in Stoke. Perhaps Alfbert saw the stranger Winegar mentioned. You should speak with him.
The stranger, Grimlac, was seen headed out the north-east gate of Stoke on horseback. Alfbert directed you to follow after Grimlac.
You should search Grimlac's body for evidence of foul play to bring to Thane Ordlac.
Thane Ordlac is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should bring the poison you found to Thane Ordlac.
